textByHash.1a18c177e4d3cdf834c18790aa25188b99777a65: Now hold on. There's a lot of minerals in there, and digging out the cave was hard work. Only a true friend of Falador would be allowed in there.
textByHash.4f766d22d3c835b348c2fd27220a47413a742204: I've also been digging out this cave recently. I found a bunch of amethyst in there.
textByHash.5c8e6305c417036d3abc563dd1fc73607caee49d: Very well. You'll no longer find any minerals when you mine here. If you change your mind just let me know.
textByHash.5d6859627ebb22cbaddb62cdbab5c1ba8f92fde0: And you truly are a friend of Falador. Well done on completing the Elite Falador Achievement Diary. Go on in, you may access the cave.
textByHash.6a5cde9fcf8e0d8867c0961f316539edaa982582: As you wish. You'll now find minerals when you mine here. Let me know if you want to change this.
textByHash.7a9b52e804df28cabb88b6f89bc852f205f421b1: It wouldn't be free though. I'd want 40 minerals in return.
textByHash.8b6a6f6a92f7fe8edebc10e005854b766de88526: I have some gloves that will help you when Mining. When you wear these gloves you'll find that some rocks will instantly respawn.
textByHash.93b93be61227da8abea63ca0de189443109c2a8d: You don't seem like you're quite there yet. Come speak to me again once you have completed the Elite Falador Achievement Diary.
textByHash.94933caf5fc11f23bc534732085b0c760500f85c: This guild contains minerals that haven't been found anywhere else. I'm here to try and identify them.
textByHash.9ba454800f66860ec93eeec5f27f138ea20a41f4: Fair enough. I'll be here if you change your mind.
textByHash.b0846e91ea26638d9cf0c537861b44f560416d6e: Beyond that, I could consider letting you access this new cave. It seems to contain even more minerals.
textByHash.c0c5d8c2818fc2f7396db31757b01750e91fa1ce: Don't forget to come to me if you find any minerals.
textByHash.c5a9cc9aa38155f456fbc46942562aa29a98bf62: There you go. I've combined your gloves into some Expert mining gloves. Enjoy.
textByHash.c93347617da195c0ec567262a270ff8e07c010b6: Hey, you! You're not allowed in there! Come speak to me first.
textByHash.ccbdabf02a3464e4bef0c4febd78dad161c2c472: If you come across any unusual minerals when mining here I'll take them off your hands. Don't worry, I'll make it worth your while.
textByHash.d17a5292ebb965751df3178749948ff417f7e00d: I guess I could combine some Mining gloves with some Superior mining gloves. These new gloves would require 70 Mining to equip.
textByHash.fa1d1efbe260f3aaeea03fbc99d7d8ada1664a1a: You don't have any gloves for me to combine. You'll need to bring me some Mining gloves and some Superior mining gloves.
